mapper.insert: INSERT INTO repair_orders (user_id, device_type, description, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{deviceType}, #{description}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id as userId, device_type as deviceType, description, status, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime FROM repair_orders WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT id, user_id as userId, device_type as deviceType, description, status, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime FROM repair_orders ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT id, user_id as userId, device_type as deviceType, description, status, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime FROM repair_orders WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE repair_orders SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
